Home › About Us › Environmental Commitment

Our Environmental Commitment

Heritage Document Services has been entrusted with the safekeeping of our clients’ documents for over forty years. As stewards of paper and digital records, we take our environmental responsibilities seriously.

We are committed to reducing our environmental impact and to operating in a sustainable manner. We continuously look for ways to reduce our carbon footprint, minimise waste, and conserve energy across our facilities.

Our approach to sustainability includes:

  • Recycling paper and cardboard waste wherever possible
  • Using energy-efficient lighting in our facilities
  • Encouraging staff to adopt environmentally friendly working practices
  • Working with our suppliers to identify opportunities to improve

Heritage Document Services supports the transition to a low-carbon economy and we look forward to playing our part in building a more sustainable future for the records management industry.

For more information about our services or our approach to sustainability, please contact our team.

Heritage Document Services Ltd. Registered in England and Wales. Last reviewed: 2023.
